response.justification: Candidate has strong individual-contributor breadth across 15+ years and recent exposure to MCP/agentic tooling, but the resume shows no engineering leadership, no team scaling, no multi-agent production systems, and only tangential fintech work. The role requires 5+ years in senior technical leadership, demonstrated production multi-agent AI, and experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+ — none of which appears here. Title progression caps at Staff/Senior IC.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack and distributed-systems experience
Recent hands-on exposure to MCP and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an event-driven, Kubernetes-deployable platform (GISCollective) showing architectural ownership
concerns: No engineering management or team-scaling track record (always IC-titled)
No evidence of production multi-agent AI systems, evaluation pipelines, or LLM ops at scale
Minimal fintech-infrastructure depth and no regulated-environment AI operations experience
